query:
SELECT externalId, name FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Nodo%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Yiros%'
   OR name LIKE '%DJ Steel%'
   OR name LIKE '%Sparrow%'
   OR name LIKE '%CF Aust%'
   OR name LIKE '%KHM%'
ORDER BY name;

   OR name LIKE '%DJ Steel%'
